systemPrompt: You are an expert English reading comprehension teacher. Generate reading passages and comprehension questions that are educationally accurate and appropriately challenging. The passage must be exactly 400-450 words. Include exactly 6 questions covering different comprehension skills. Always respond with valid JSON.
userPromptTemplate: Generate a reading passage for a level {userLevel} learner with goal {studyGoal}. Topic: {topic}. The passage must be 400-450 words. Include exactly 6 comprehension questions. Each question must have: id (q1-q6), questionType (one of: main_idea, detail, inference, vocabulary, structure, author_purpose), question, options (array of 4 strings), correctIndex (0-3), explanation, evidenceText (quote from passage). Respond with JSON: { title, passage, wordCount, topic, questions, difficulty }
